assignments.twist: the neuronal cable equation generalized to arbitrary cable geometry via Frenet-Serret framing, reducing to a diffusion-with-decay equation carrying a geometric source term set by the cross-section area and its derivatives

core_model_summary: The dendritic/axonal cable equation (leaky diffusion of membrane voltage) extended to non-cylindrical geometry, where curvature, torsion, and varying cross-section enter as an effective geometric source term.
